items.title: OpenMythos
items.description: A theoretical reconstruction of the Claude Mythos architecture, built from first principles using the available research literature.
items.summary: OpenMythos is a theoretical reconstruction of Anthropic's Claude architecture, built from first principles. It aims to provide insights into large language model architectures. It is not an official implementation by Anthropic.

items.title: browser-harness
items.description: Browser Harness | Self-healing harness that enables LLMs to complete any task.
items.summary: Browser Harness is a self-healing browser control system for language models to complete tasks. It uses Chrome DevTools Protocol for direct browser control. It has over 6,000 stars on GitHub.

items.title: huashu-design
items.description: Huashu Design · HTML-native design skill for Claude Code · Claude Code 里 HTML 原生的设计 skill · 高保真原型 / 幻灯片 / 动画 + 20 设计哲学 + 5 维评审 + MP4 导出 · Agent-agnostic
items.summary: Huashu Design offers HTML-native skills for high-fidelity prototypes, slides, animations, and 20 design philosophies with 5-dimensional expert reviews. It exports to MP4 and is agent-agnostic.

items.title: awesome-gpt-image-2-prompts
items.description: Curated GPT-Image-2 prompts fot the Openai API：image examples across portraits, posters, UI mockups, character sheets, and community experiments.
items.summary: GPT-Image-2 offers diverse prompt examples for various visual outputs. It includes categories like portraits, posters, and UI mockups. Use these prompts to generate high-quality visuals directly.

items.title: open-codesign
items.description: Open-source Claude Design alternative. One-click import your Claude Code / Codex API key. Prompt → prototype / slides / PDF. Multi-model (Claude, GPT, Gemini, Kimi, GLM, Ollama). BYOK, local-first, MIT.
items.summary: Open CoDesign is an open-source alternative to Claude design tools, supporting multiple AI models and offering local, on-device functionality. It allows importing various API keys and exports to formats like PDF and PPTX. It's free with token costs for models.

items.title: gpt2api
items.description: 基于 chatgpt.com 逆向的 OpenAI 兼容 SaaS 网关 · GPT-IMAGE-2 稳定 · 批量出图 · 多账号池 · 高并发调度 · 积分计费 · 技术交流QQ 群 382446
items.summary: gpt2api is a service that mimics the API of chatgpt.com for use with other platforms. It's built by a team of inventors at Amazon. It's not officially endorsed by Amazon.

items.title: web-design-skill
items.description: An AI agent skill that transforms AI-generated web pages from "functional" to "stunning."(Inspired by Claude Design)
items.summary: An AI agent skill transforms AI-generated web pages from functional to stunning, using a six-step workflow. It avoids clichés and enhances design quality. This skill is available on GitHub and other platforms.

items.title: OpenGame
items.description: OpenGame: Open Agentic Coding for Games
items.summary: OpenGame is an open-source framework for creating web games using specialized code models. It includes an evaluation pipeline called OpenGame-Bench to assess game quality. It aims to simplify interactive application development.

items.title: chatgpt2api
items.summary: There is no official ChatGPT API. The underlying model for some versions is GPT-3.5. Users often access it via the Openai API.

items.title: cc-design
items.description: High-fidelity HTML design and prototype guidance skill for AI agents
items.summary: CC-Design is a high-fidelity HTML design and prototype guidance skill for AI agents, producing verified, error-free prototypes and emphasizing visual fidelity. It includes templates, routing logic, and a stepwise workflow. Available on GitHub for open-source projects.

items.title: mercury-agent
items.description: Soul-driven AI agent with permission-hardened tools, token budgets, and multi-channel access. Runs 24/7 from CLI or Telegram.
items.summary: Mercury Agent is a 24/7 AI operating via CLI or Telegram, featuring permission-hardened tools and token budgets. It provides multi-channel access and full control. Developed by Cosmicstack Labs.

items.title: agents-md
items.description: Drop-in AGENTS.md that makes every coding agent behave like a senior engineer instead of an eager intern. Kills sycophancy, stops drive-by refactors, forces verification loops. Synthesizes Karpathy's four principles and Boris Cherny's Claude Code workflow. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and the open standard.
items.summary: Agents-md elevates coding agents to senior engineer standards, eliminates sycophancy, and enforces rigorous verification. It integrates Karpathy's principles and Boris Cherny's workflow for optimal coding. Works seamlessly with various tools and standards.

items.title: Cairn
items.description: AI 自动化通用问题解决 / AI 自动化渗透测试系统
items.summary: AI tools like AiScan-N automate penetration testing and CTF solving using AI models for vulnerability detection and script generation. These tools integrate multiple AI models for enhanced security testing capabilities. They support both cloud and local deployments for flexible usage.

items.title: CrabTrap
items.description: An LLM-as-a-judge HTTP proxy to secure agents in production
items.summary: CrabTrap is an HTTP proxy that uses an LLM to evaluate AI agent requests, ensuring secure outbound traffic to external APIs. It enforces security policies and protects agents in production environments. The system monitors and approves or denies API calls based on predefined rules.

items.title: Freebuff2API
items.description: 🚀 OpenAI-compatible Freebuff proxy with dynamic free-agent tracking, token rotation, and ready-to-use Docker deployment.
items.summary: The Freebuff2API is an open-source proxy server for LLM APIs with automatic token rotation and usage tracking. It supports multiple AI providers and is deployable via Docker. It's designed for development and not for production use.

items.title: pi-computer-use
items.description: control your applications using pi-coding-agent. fully invisible.
items.summary: Pi-computer-use is a CLI tool for advanced engineers to control applications via a coding agent, offering full, invisible integration. It supports non-Anthropic models for cost and privacy benefits. The GitHub repository provides additional tools and extensions.

items.title: swarm-forge
items.description: A simple tool for coordinating several AI agents.
items.summary: Swarm-forge is a tool for coordinating multiple AI agents, facilitating their interaction and workflow management. It aims to simplify complex multi-agent systems. It's open-source and available on GitHub.

items.title: agent-style
items.description: 21 writing rules for AI coding and writing agents. Drop-in for Claude Code, Codex, Copilot, Cursor, and Aider, so their output reads like a tech pro.
items.summary: AI coding agents like Claude Code and Cursor follow 21 curated style rules for precise, professional writing. They can handle multi-step tasks independently, from drafting documentation to submitting pull requests. These agents improve technical writing by maintaining consistency and understanding project context.

items.title: browser-harness-js
items.description: Self-healing browser harness that enables LLMs to complete any task
items.summary: Browser Harness JS is an open-source tool enabling LLMs to control browsers freely. It uses Chrome DevTools Protocol for self-healing capabilities. It allows LLMs to complete any browser task autonomously.

items.title: superlevels
items.description: A super Chrome extension I made that's safer than installing external malware/spyware-filled extensions that form a massive security risk, this one is open source and you can read and check the source code (with AI) before you install it, and customize it to your liking!
items.summary: SuperLevels is a safe, open-source Chrome extension. Its source code is available for review, reducing security risks. It combines multiple features into one customizable, secure extension.

items.title: esp-claw
items.description: ESP-Claw, a "Chat Coding" AI agent framework for IoT devices
items.summary: ESP-Claw is an edge AI framework for IoT devices that uses chat coding to define device behavior locally on Espressif chips, enabling real-time responses and reducing cloud dependency. It combines LLM dynamic decision-making with Lua rules for local execution. No programming is required; it uses conversations to create device logic.

items.title: hi-kid
items.description: HiKid - Your AI English Pal. A desktop app built with React and TypeScript, targeting children in non-English-speaking countries who want to practice English speaking and listening.
items.summary: HiKid is a free, open-source desktop app for children to practice English offline. It uses local processing for privacy. Built with React and TypeScript, it targets kids in non-English-speaking countries.

items.title: alice
items.description: Analyse · Learn · Ingest · Curate · Export — AI-powered YOLO dataset management toolkit
items.summary: Alice is an AI-powered toolkit for YOLO dataset management. It includes features to analyze, learn, ingest, curate, and export data. It is a comprehensive solution for managing image annotation and training.

items.title: freellmapi
items.description: OpenAI-compatible proxy that aggregates free-tier keys from ~14 AI providers with automatic failover. For personal experimentation only.
items.summary: FreeLLMAPI is an open-source proxy aggregating free-tier keys from ~14 AI providers with automatic failover for personal experimentation. It's compatible with the OpenAI API. Use it for free access to various models without payment.

items.title: agent-startup-kit
items.description: Reusable AI coding workflows for Claude Code and VS Code to ship auth, billing, and landing pages faster.
items.summary: The agent-startup-kit offers reusable AI coding workflows for faster SaaS development, including auth, billing, and landing pages, using tools like Claude Code and VS Code. It includes templates and infrastructure for building AI agents.

items.title: expo-agent-spinners
items.description: 54 terminal-style agent-like spinners for React Native & Expo. Lightweight, zero native dependencies — just Text. No heavy UI threads
items.summary: expo-agent-spinners offers 54 terminal-style spinners for React Native & Expo, using only text, with no native dependencies. It's lightweight and avoids heavy UI threads. The library is available on GitHub.

items.title: text-to-cad
items.description: An open source harness for generating CAD models
items.summary: Text-to-CAD is an open-source tool that converts text prompts into 3D CAD models. It supports exporting formats like STEP, STL, DXF, and GLB. The project is available on GitHub and can be used via Zoo Design Studio.

items.title: Uncensored-Local-AI-Multiplatform
items.description: A cross-platform Flutter app that runs uncensored, 100% offline open-source AI models (GGUF) directly on your Android, iOS, or PC. No cloud, no filters, total privacy.
items.summary: Uncensored-Local-AI-Multiplatform is a cross-platform Flutter app running uncensored, offline open-source AI models directly on Android, iOS, or PC. It offers total privacy without cloud or filters. The app uses GGUF models for local, uncensored AI.

items.title: Hy3-preview
items.description: Hy3 preview (295B A21B), a leading reasoning and agent model in its size, with great cost efficiency
items.summary: Hy3 preview is a high-efficiency Mixture-of-Experts model from Tencent, known for cost efficiency and strong code generation. It supports reasoning levels for different task needs and is designed for production use. Released in 2026, it balances speed and depth effectively.

items.title: dspy-agent-skills
items.description: Production-grade DSPy 3.2.x agent skills + validated end-to-end examples for Claude Code and Codex CLI — fundamentals, evaluation, GEPA, BetterTogether, and RLM.
items.summary: DSPy 3.2.x agent skills include fundamentals, evaluation, GEPA, BetterTogether, and RLM, with validated examples on GitHub and Reddit for prompt optimization. Key resources include OmidZamani/dspy-skills and ivanvza/dspy-skills. These skills enhance LLM applications.

items.title: AITD
items.description: AI Trading Agent for Everyone
items.summary: AITD is a versatile AI trading agent that can run on any machine, allowing for paper trading and live trading. It automates trading tasks and has achieved profitable results.

items.title: Supervisor-Skills
items.description: 将博导十年科研经验炼化为可直接调用的 AI 技能。从 Idea 构思到论文投稿，你的 AI 科研副导师。
items.summary: Supervisor-Skills compiles a decade of research expertise into AI-driven skills, aiding from idea generation to paper submission. It's an AI research assistant. Access it on GitHub.

items.title: auto-memory
items.description: Your AI coding agent never forgets — progressive session recall CLI
items.summary: Auto-memory is a CLI tool that enhances Copilot's context recall, eliminating context loss between sessions. It uses local SQLite for instant recall without needing a server. Agent-recall offers a similar solution to retain AI coding assistant context.

items.title: WorldX
items.description: One sentence creates an AI-driven world — generate maps, characters, and watch stories emerge on their own. 一句话生成一个AI自主驱动的世界.
items.summary: WorldX creates AI-driven worlds with one sentence, generating maps, characters, and stories autonomously. Genie 3 by Google DeepMind generates interactive, consistent virtual worlds from text prompts. Marble is an AI-driven tool for generating 3D worlds from various inputs.

items.title: agent-skills
items.description: Reusable agent skills for Codex and compatible tools
items.summary: Reusable agent skills enable AI agents to automate tasks like coding, searching, and workflow management. They run with agent permissions, so use them cautiously. Skills can be shared and used across various AI platforms.

items.title: gpt_image_2_skill
items.description: Curated T2I prompts and skill/CLI wrappers for GPT Image 2
items.summary: GPT Image 2 is an advanced text-to-image model by Azure OpenAI. It uses CLI tools for image generation and has improved quality and style consistency. The t2i CLI can configure and use GPT-Image-2 for generating images.

items.title: ascent-research
items.description: research cli for agent
items.summary: The ascent-research CLI is a tool for agent research, developed by actionbook, with persistent memory features. It allows agents to store and retrieve knowledge across sessions. The CLI is hosted on GitHub.

items.title: CyberVerse
items.description: CyberVerse is an open-source digital human agent platform with real-time video calling. Create an AI agent you can see and talk to, face to face, just like a video call.
items.summary: CyberVerse is an open-source platform for real-time video calling with digital human agents. It allows users to interact face-to-face with AI agents. The platform is designed for practical, real-world applications.

items.title: AlphaBrain
items.description: The Comprehensive Toolkit for Embodied AI Models
items.summary: AlphaBrain is an open-source toolkit for embodied AI models, integrating various architectures and algorithms. It features dual "Fast + Slow" systems for real-time motion planning. The project is fully open-sourced and available on GitHub.

items.title: agent-simulator
items.description: An iOS simulator in a browser you can inspect
items.summary: Agent-Simulator is an open-source tool that streams an iOS simulator into a browser for inspection and interaction. It allows users to control iOS apps directly from a web browser. It uses React Native inspector and MCP bridge for functionality.

items.title: cavemem
items.description: Cross-agent persistent memory for coding assistants. Stored compressed. Retrieved fast. Local by default.
items.summary: Cross-agent persistent memory for coding assistants uses SQLite for storage, supports fast retrieval, and is local by default. It enables context retention across sessions for better coding assistance.

items.title: geo-citation-lab
items.description: A dataset and analysis pipeline for studying how AI search engines select and use citations.
items.summary: The geo-citation-lab dataset studies AI search engines' citation selection. Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) enhances AI citation visibility. GEO focuses on content that answers queries directly for better AI citations.

items.title: embed-ai-tool
items.description: 面向 AI 编程助手的嵌入式开发技能集，为大模型提供 MCU 固件开发全流程能力。涵盖多工具链构建（Keil / IAR / CMake / PlatformIO）、烧录、GDB 调试、串口监视、Modbus / CAN / VISA 协议调试、外设驱动适配及流水线编排，支持 Linux、macOS、Windows 三平台。
items.summary: To install the embed-ai-tool skill, clone the GitHub repository and follow the README instructions. It supports MCU firmware development across Keil, IAR, CMake, and PlatformIO, and runs on Linux, macOS, and Windows.

items.title: ai-application-roadmap
items.description: A bilingual map of AI engineering evolution, real-world AI usage patterns, and vibe coding best practices.
items.summary: AI engineering roadmaps emphasize real-world applications, continuous learning, and specialization in fields like NLP, CV, and RL. Essential tools include LangChain and vector databases. Focus on practical projects and evolving with the field.

items.title: MultiWorld
items.description: Official Implementation of MultiWorld: Scalable Multi-Agent Multi-View Video World Models
items.summary: MultiWorld is a framework for scalable multi-agent world modeling that generates multi-view-consistent videos for multi-player games. It enables action-controllable simulations. Implementations and detailed results are available upon request.

items.title: future-agi
items.description: Open-source, end-to-end platform for evaluating, observing, and improving LLM and AI agent applications. Tracing · Evals · Simulations · Datasets · Gateway · Guardrails. Self-hostable. Apache 2.0.
items.summary: Future AGI is an open-source platform for evaluating, observing, and improving AI applications. It includes tools for simulations, evaluations, and guardrails. It is self-hostable under an Apache 2.0 license.

items.title: WindsurfPoolAPI
items.description: Multi-account pool proxy for Windsurf — 113+ models (Claude/GPT/Gemini/Grok/Kimi) via OpenAI & Anthropic APIs, image upload, Cursor & Claude Code native / 企业级 Windsurf 多账号池化 API 代理
items.summary: WindsurfPoolAPI is a multi-account pool proxy for various AI models via APIs from providers like OpenAI and Anthropic. It supports image uploads and native code execution. It's designed for enterprise-level use.

items.title: mcp-cli
items.description: save fork/exec overhead of ai code agent
items.summary: mcp-cli reduces token overhead by enabling dynamic tool discovery and invocation, cutting usage by up to 98% in benchmarks. It avoids the inefficiencies of static MCP prompt injection. Use mcp-cli for scalable, token-efficient AI agents.

items.title: LazyPi
items.description: Pi coding agent setup for the lazy
items.summary: LazyPi is a command-line tool for setting up a Pi coding agent with one command. It installs 24 curated packages and offers an interactive picker for customization. Use `npx @robzolkos/lazypi` to install or update.

items.title: n8n-Actual-Automation
items.description: 6 n8n workflows for Actual Budget — AI transaction categorization, envelope auto-funding, and weekly budget briefing via Telegram
items.summary: n8n workflows automate expense tracking, categorize transactions via AI, and send weekly budget briefings via Telegram. Essential tools include Telegram bots, AI for categorization, and Google Sheets for logging.
